description_long: This is a modern, rectangular shelving and cabinet unit constructed primarily from wood and metal. The front features a combination of open shelves, closed compartments with textured geometric-patterned doors, and a set of drawers at the bottom left. The wood panels have a natural, medium-brown finish, while the frame and supports are made of dark metal, giving it an industrial aesthetic. The left and right compartments have distinct 3D-patterned doors, while the central section is open, providing both display and storage options. The back and sides are flat wood panels, and the unit stands on four metal legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall design is functional yet decorative, suitable for urban interiors such as lofts, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A modern wood and metal shelving unit with geometric-patterned doors, open shelves, and drawers, featuring an industrial design. The structure combines closed storage and open display areas with a natural wood finish and dark metal frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing open shelves, two textured doors, and drawers on the bottom left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow depth and layered construction of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying flat wood panels and the geometric door patterns on the left and right compartments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the unit's slim profile and open central section.
